records.question: Which payments were made exactly on 2005-08-02 21:47:26.0 with an amount of 0.99 and last updated on or after 2006-02-15 22:18:11.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT payment.payment_id FROM payment
WHERE payment.payment_date = '2005-08-02 21:47:26.0' AND payment.amount = 0.99 AND payment.last_update >= '2006-02-15 22:18:11.0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT payment_id FROM payment WHERE payment_date = '2005-08-02 21:47:26.0' AND amount = 0.99 AND last_update >= '2006-02-15 22:18:11.0'
